name: Find and add lookalike influencers to HubSpot with influencers.club and GPT-4o-mini
description:
How it works:

Find lookalikes to other creators and add to your CRM for influencer outreach and partnerships.

Step by step workflow to discover similar creators to your best performers with multi social (Instagram, Tiktok, Youtube, Twitter, Onlyfans, Twitch and more) profiles, analytics and metrics using the influencers.club API, and add the contact records and data in Hubspot

Set up:

Hubspot (can be swapped for any CRM like Salesforce or Google Sheet)
Influencers.club API key
